title: pseudoraphis spinescens var. subglabra
intro: Pseudoraphis spinescens var. subglabra, commonly known as a type of grass, is a plant species used in traditional medicine. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which are believed to help in treating various health conditions. The health benefits associated with this plant include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and support wound healing. Pseudoraphis spinescens var. subglabra is often used in herbal preparations, such as teas and infusions, which are made by boiling the plant's leaves and stems in water to extract its medicinal properties.
